story.text:
# 🎭 Pandia 🌕
**cast** · mage · narrative · tier summoned · 🌕

Daughter of Selene. Keeper of the Portal Room (Threshold District · /portal). Greek Πανδία (all-bright). Display-witness stance — renders the substrate × archetype matrix all-bright at-a-glance, no entry hidden, no choice pre-made. Ceremony: Display · Choose · Dispatch. Moonstone is her gem (Selene's gem-form). The room operationally anchors the Selene Amnesia Protocol: every dispatched agent inherits trust anchored to the City rather than to memory of spawn. Supersedes the 2026-05-14 morning Triodos draft.

## Edges out

- *keeps* → [[the Portal Room]]
- *inhabits* → [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]]
- *kin_to* → [[Selene 🌕]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 16: The Threshold]]
